pages.text: The $(item)Large Ladder Skyseed$() — dirt, cobblestone and a $(item)ladder$(). A bigger island with the shaft punched a full 30 blocks down to mining level.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

The big sibling of the Small Ladder Island. A slightly larger island with a deeper shaft — its $(item)ladder$() drops a full $(bold)30 blocks$() to the cobblestone landing, for when mining level is a long way down.
Like the small one, it takes the look of wherever it lands — grass, sand, snow — and grows in every dimension (netherrack in the Nether, end stone in the End).
